name: Chicken with Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice and prepare chicken, zucchini, and bamboo shoots. Marinate the chicken in soya sauce, wine, and salt.
2. Place oil in a wok and heat to smoking point. Stir chicken in the hot oil for 3 minutes until all sides of chicken are seared white.
3. Add zucchini, bamboo shoots, and water. Cook on medium high heat for 7 1/2 minutes. Zucchini should be very tender by this time, and the liquid in the wok should have been absorbed by the vegetables.
NOTE: Pork can be substituted for chicken, but cooked longer.
